DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT SAFEWAY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR ONE FULL DAY OF DEPOSITION ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 19, 2007 AT A TIME MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TO THE PARTIES. THE DEPOSITION SHALL RESUME UPON PLAINTIFF'S RETURN FROM ITALY AFTER DECEMBER 17, 2007. THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 31, 2007. THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Michele R. Wolf, Esq. appearing for plaintiff and opposing party Lorena Z. Donati
No appearance for other parties.

RULING:
Defendant Safeway's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for one full day of deposition on or before October 19, 2007 at a time mutually convenient to the parties. The deposition shall resume upon plaintiff's return from Italy after December 17, 2007. The deposition shall be completed no later than December 31, 2007. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
